_meta.source: RL Creates Magic (Rashi Lohade) + ICBI public methodology + Color Me Beautiful 12-season + Kibbe body types + standard tailoring conventions
_meta.fill_status: PRODUCTION-READY. All TODOs filled per industry standard. Rashi to validate against her trained eye before scale rollout.
frameworks_referenced: ICBI (Image Consulting Business Institute) - Suman Agarwal - public methodology
Color Me Beautiful 12-season system (Carole Jackson) - adapted for Indian skin
Indian National Institute of Fashion Technology (NIFT) silhouette standards
_meta.instructions: All recommendations route through this KB. AI orchestrator must validate output against language_safety_rules. Never invent recommendations beyond this KB.

triangular.identification_rule: Hips wider than shoulders by 5%+; defined waist; weight tends to settle on hips, thighs, lower body
triangular.goal: Balance silhouette by adding volume to upper body and drawing attention upward
sleeves_avoid: Sleeveless without shoulder detail (may exaggerate ratio)
tops_flatter: Tops with horizontal details on top half
tops_avoid: Deep V that draws eye downward to hip
Tops ending at widest hip point
triangular.rise: High or mid-rise preferred; sits at natural waist for definition
triangular.saree_blouse: Boat neck or sweetheart with detail; puff or statement sleeves; embroidered yoke; structured shoulders preferred
dupatta_drapes: Long & flowy down both sides (volume up top)
blazer_cuts: Hip-length or slightly longer (covers widest point)
blazer_avoid: Very long that covers without defining
fabrics_avoid: Stiff heavy fabrics on lower half
triangular.color_strategy: Lighter/brighter colors on top, darker monochrome on bottom; statement colors above waist; create vertical color flow
triangular.belt_strategy: Belts at natural waist or just above to define hourglass illusion; tie-waist tops; fitted blazers with belted cinch; medium-width belts (1.5-2 inches)
bag_shapes: Statement bags carried at upper body
earring_shapes: Long drops drawing eye to face
triangular.necklace_strategy: Statement necklaces; long pendants on bare neck; layered chains for daily
overall_tips: Highlight upper body and face
Define waist clearly
Choose well-fitted structured pieces
Keep bottoms simple, streamlined and tailored
Avoid hip-emphasizing details
triangular.quick_tip: Balance is the key — highlight your beautiful upper body, define your waist, and keep your lower half sleek and simple.

inverted_triangular.identification_rule: Shoulders wider than hips by 5%+; broad shoulders or fuller bust; narrow hips
inverted_triangular.goal: Balance broader shoulders by drawing attention downward and adding volume to the lower half
sleeves_avoid: Cap sleeves that emphasize shoulder width
tops_flatter: Yoke or patterned kurtis with center detail
bottoms_avoid: Pencil skirts that minimize lower body
dress_silhouettes: Fit and flare with full skirt
saree_drape_styles: Heavy borders at hem (draws eye down)
inverted_triangular.saree_blouse: V-neck or sweetheart; minimal shoulder detail; 3/4 sleeves; no shoulder embellishment
dupatta_drapes: Layer with jackets or shrugs (adds depth without shoulder width)
fabrics_flatter: Stiff fabrics for lower volume (cotton, taffeta, organza)
inverted_triangular.color_strategy: Darker shades on top, brighter/patterned/lighter colors on bottom; create downward color flow
inverted_triangular.belt_strategy: Cinched waists, belts, or fitted blazers create hourglass illusion; medium-width belt at natural waist
bag_shapes: Structured bags carried at hip level
inverted_triangular.necklace_strategy: Long pendants drawing eye down center; avoid statement collar necklaces
overall_tips: Emphasize the lower half
Add volume below the waist
Define waist with belts and cinches
Avoid all shoulder embellishments
Keep top half visually quiet
inverted_triangular.quick_tip: Add volume below, keep volume off shoulders. A wide-leg trouser with a fitted V-neck top is your power formula.

rectangular.identification_rule: Shoulders, waist, and hips are similar (variance ≤5%); minimal waist definition
rectangular.goal: Create the illusion of curves, define the waist, and add softness with details, layers, and drapes
sleeves_avoid: Plain tight sleeves with no detail
rectangular.saree_blouse: Sweetheart or scoop; ruffled or peplum; 3/4 sleeves with detail; padded for bust illusion if desired
blazer_avoid: Boxy or oversized that hides waistline
patterns_flatter: Border prints with horizontal interest at bust
rectangular.color_strategy: Play with colors, prints & accessories to add personality and break the straight line; color-block at the waist for definition
rectangular.belt_strategy: Define waist with belts (medium width 1.5-2 inches), tie-ups, fitted styles; layering adds dimension and curves
rectangular.necklace_strategy: Layered necklaces add dimension; statement pieces work well
overall_tips: Add curves, movement, definition
Define waist with belts/ties/fitted styles
Add volume with ruffles/layers/gathers/flared silhouettes
Play with colors and prints to break straight line
Soft fabrics over stiff ones
rectangular.quick_tip: Your goal is curves and movement. Define your waist, add ruffles or peplums, and you'll create the hourglass illusion that suits you beautifully.

hourglass.identification_rule: Shoulders and hips similar; waist 25%+ smaller than both; defined natural curves
hourglass.goal: Highlight the natural waist, maintain proportion, never hide curves
necklines_avoid: Very high necks that flatten chest
tops_flatter: Straight fit kurtis with side slits
hourglass.rise: High or mid-rise that defines waist
hourglass.saree_blouse: V-neck, keyhole, collared blazers; well-fitted to highlight curves; tailored fits flatter shape
dupatta_avoid: Voluminous or heavy dupattas that hide waist
patterns_avoid: Large block patterns that fight curves
hourglass.color_strategy: Jewel tones, earthy hues, pastels & classic neutrals; monochromatic for elongated power look
hourglass.belt_strategy: Use belts, tie-ups, structured cuts or nipped-in styles to highlight natural waist; thin belts to medium-width
hourglass.necklace_strategy: Minimal necklaces; pendants that follow neckline curve
overall_tips: Always define the waist
Choose structured or semi-structured silhouettes
Quality fabrics and impeccable tailoring
Keep accessories minimal, elegant and purposeful
Never hide your shape — fitted always wins
hourglass.quick_tip: Tuck in to highlight the waist. A blazer that nips at the waist = instant executive presence.

diamond.identification_rule: Midriff is widest; shoulders & hips narrower; weight settles around midsection
diamond.goal: Minimize midsection, enhance shoulders and hips, create balanced professional silhouette
sleeves_flatter: Slight puff at shoulder (adds shoulder width)
sleeves_avoid: Sleeveless if upper arms are concern
tops_flatter: Drape flowy fabrics that skim over midsection
tops_avoid: Stiff shirts that cling at midsection
bottoms_flatter: Softly structured trousers that skim waist
Belted or textured trousers in lighter fabrics
diamond.rise: High mid-rise that defines waist subtly without cinching
dress_silhouettes: A-line that flares from below bust
saree_drape_styles: Soft flowy fabrics (georgette, chiffon, crepe, silk blends)
Slightly flared drapes with tailored blouses
Heavy work or darker shades on upper body
Lighter shades on upper body create shape
Belted sarees high above natural waist
diamond.saree_blouse: Tailored, fitted; V-neck or scoop; 3/4 sleeve; structured shoulders preferred
blazer_cuts: Softly structured blazers that skim the waist
Belted or ruched blazers (above natural waist)
fabrics_avoid: Stiff structured fabrics that cling at midsection
patterns_flatter: Embroidery on upper body or vertical panels
diamond.color_strategy: Darker tones on upper body create shape; vertical color blocks (dark on sides, lighter center vertical strip); subtle balanced palette
diamond.belt_strategy: If belted, place above natural waist (under bust); narrow belts only; avoid cinching
bag_shapes: Structured bags carried at upper body level
diamond.necklace_strategy: Long pendants creating vertical line; avoid choker/short necklaces
overall_tips: Balance is key — minimize midsection, focus on shoulders and hips
Confidence is about subtle shaping that flatters and refines
Elongate the upper body with vertical lines
Create shape with layers
Favor darker and subtle colors at the midsection
diamond.quick_tip: Tuck in to highlight the bust line, not the natural waist. Empire-waist styles are your best friend.

tubular.identification_rule: Tall and narrow throughout; shoulders ≈ waist ≈ hips with minimal width variance; lean frame; minimal natural curves
tubular.goal: Add visual width and create feminine curves through clothing structure, layers, and details
sleeves_avoid: Plain tight set-in sleeves with no detail
saree_drape_styles: Heavy borders at hem (adds lower volume)
tubular.saree_blouse: Padded/structured; sweetheart or scoop; statement sleeves (puff/bell); embellished for visual interest at bust
fabrics_avoid: Very thin clingy fabrics that fall flat
tubular.color_strategy: Color blocking, contrast top/bottom, light/bright colors at hip/bust to create curves; never head-to-toe black (loses shape)
tubular.belt_strategy: Wide belts (2-3 inches) at natural waist; statement buckles; cummerbunds; sashes; layered belts
bag_shapes: Slouchy shapes that add visual volume
tubular.necklace_strategy: Statement chokers add upper body volume; layered necklaces; bib-style for special events
overall_tips: Create curves through structure, layers, and detail
Belts and waist definition are essential
Don't be afraid of bold prints and color blocking
Stiff fabrics work harder for you than soft drapes
Layer pieces to add visual dimension
tubular.quick_tip: You have model proportions. Use clothing to create the curves: peplum tops, A-line skirts, wide belts.

rounded.identification_rule: Fuller throughout with rounded curves; bust and midsection prominent; less defined shoulders and waist; soft overall silhouette
rounded.goal: Define waist subtly, elongate silhouette, draw eye upward, create vertical lines
necklines_flatter: Embellished necklines that draw eye up
sleeves_avoid: Cap sleeves cutting at fullest arm
dress_silhouettes: Fit and flare from below bust
Maxi dresses with belt under bust
saree_drape_styles: Structured fabrics that drape close to body (silk, georgette, crepe blends)
rounded.saree_blouse: Structured, well-fitted; V-neck or scoop; padded with support; 3/4 sleeves preferred
dupatta_drapes: Use belts to define waist when draping
blazer_avoid: Tightly fitted at midsection without flow
fabrics_avoid: Very loose drapes that look bulky
rounded.color_strategy: Darker tones create slimming effect; vertical detailing and subtle patterns; monochromatic dressing for elongated look
rounded.belt_strategy: Belt or cinch the waist gently (not tightly); medium-width belt; same-tone-as-outfit belt for subtle definition
footwear_avoid: Ankle straps that cut leg line
bag_shapes: Avoid tiny bags (look smaller in contrast)
rounded.necklace_strategy: Long pendants creating strong vertical line; avoid choker styles
overall_tips: Tuck in to define the waist (with structured tucks, not tight)
Open and soft necklines
Belt or cinch the waist
Tailored layering
High-rise bottoms that define waist
Dark and neutral colors for slimming
Vertical detailing throughout
rounded.quick_tip: Vertical lines and gentle waist definition are your tools. A-line silhouettes and high-rise bottoms transform your figure beautifully.

triangular.identification_rule: Hips/waist wider than shoulders; weight settles around middle and lower body
triangular.goal: Balance silhouette by emphasizing the upper half and adding shoulder presence
triangular.trouser_color: Dark navy, charcoal, black; darker colors below
triangular.belt: Plain belts; sleek leather; medium-width 1.25-1.5 inches
footwear: Oxford or derby in dark colors
triangular.watch_size: Larger watch case (42-44mm) — adds wrist presence
triangular.color_strategy: Focus color and detail on upper garments; darker colors below; lighter colored shirts to draw eye up
overall_tips: Balance the silhouette by adding upper presence
Emphasize the upper half with detail and color
Define waist and hips subtly
Choose darker colors below
Focus all color and detail on upper garments

inverted_triangular.identification_rule: Shoulders much wider than waist (athletic V-shape); broad chest; narrow hips
inverted_triangular.goal: Balance broad shoulders by adding volume to lower body and softening shoulder line
inverted_triangular.tie_width: Knit ties for texture; standard 2.5-2.75 inches; avoid wide ties
trouser_avoid: Tapered slim cuts that emphasize narrow hips
inverted_triangular.trouser_color: Lighter or textured below to add visual weight; mid-tones
inverted_triangular.belt: Belted trousers; standard or wider belts add lower body presence
inverted_triangular.color_strategy: Lighter colors below; add tasteful patterns below; darker subtle tops; create visual flow downward
overall_tips: Balance the silhouette downward
Emphasize the waist subtly
Add volume below with cuts and patterns
Choose open collars and textured ties
Avoid all shoulder padding and structure

rectangular.identification_rule: Shoulders, waist, and hips similar in width; minimal natural taper
rectangular.goal: Create subtle waist definition and add visual dimension through structure and detail
suit_jacket: Belted blazers with adjustable side tabs
rectangular.trouser_color: Solid darker colors with subtle pattern accents
rectangular.belt: Belted blazers and adjustable side tabs at waist for definition; standard belt with quality buckle
rectangular.color_strategy: Layer with structure; introduce dimension below; use color to break vertical line
overall_tips: Balance the silhouette with structure
Choose structured blazers with light padding
Add definition to the waist
Define the leg line subtly with tapered cuts
Opt for fitted shirts and bold textures
Introduce dimension below with patterns
Focus on tailoring quality and accessories

diamond.identification_rule: Midsection is widest; shoulders and lower body narrower
diamond.goal: Minimize midsection visually, balance through shoulders and legs, create vertical lines
diamond.trouser_color: Darker tones below; deep jewel tones for richness
diamond.belt: Narrow belts that don't draw attention to midsection; tonal belt to outfit color
diamond.color_strategy: Deep jewel tones and rich fabrics; vertical color flow; darker top to bottom or monochromatic
overall_tips: Balance the silhouette with vertical lines
Choose vertical details throughout
Add definition to the waist subtly (low-button blazer)
Define the neckline with V-necks and open collars
Opt for V-necks and dark knitwear
Introduce rich colors and textures
Focus on vertical lines and soft tailoring

tubular.identification_rule: Tall and slim with narrow proportions throughout; minimal width variance; lean frame
tubular.goal: Add visual breadth and presence; avoid drowning in fabric; build out with structure
tubular.tie_width: Wider ties (3 inches), bold patterns; visual weight
tubular.trouser_color: Layering colors; lighter on bottom can add visual width; mid-tones over dark
tubular.belt: Standard width 1.25-1.5 inches; statement buckle; quality leather
footwear: Visual interest with welt and structure
tubular.color_strategy: Layering with contrasts; lighter colors on bottom OK; horizontal color blocking acceptable
overall_tips: Add visual breadth with structure and texture
Layer pieces — vests, cardigans, scarves
Choose textured fabrics over thin smooth ones
Horizontal stripes work in your favor
Slim-fit tailored — never tight, never oversized

rounded.identification_rule: Fuller midsection with less defined shoulders; soft overall silhouette; weight throughout torso
rounded.goal: Create vertical lines, use dark tones, focus on clean drape and tailored fit
suit_jacket: Subtle shoulder padding and wool blends
rounded.tie_width: Slightly looser tie knot, comfortable; standard 2.75-3 inches
rounded.trouser_color: Monochromatic schemes and dark suiting; tonal dressing for elongation
rounded.rise: Mid to high-rise tailored; comfortable waistband
rounded.belt: Tonal belt for elongation; dark colors; medium-width
rounded.color_strategy: Dark colors and tonal looks; monochromatic schemes and dark suiting; tonal dressing for elongation; never high-contrast at midsection
overall_tips: Office attire goal: balance comfort and shape for clean professional look
Create vertical lines throughout the outfit
Use dark colors and tonal looks
Opt for structured shoulders and soft fabrics
Define the neckline subtly for comfort
Choose single-breasted and V-neck knitwear
Introduce subtle textures below
Focus on clean drape and tailored fit

oval.identification_rule: Length = 1.5x width; jaw narrower than cheekbones; soft chin; balanced proportions
oval.characteristics: The most balanced face shape; nearly all styles work well
oval.eyebrow_shape: Soft arch following natural shape; medium thickness
earrings_women: Any shape — studs, hoops, drops, chandeliers all work
oval.headshot_pose_tip: Slight chin tilt down; natural three-quarter angle works

round.identification_rule: Length ≈ width; soft jawline; full cheeks; rounded chin; widest at cheeks
round.eyebrow_shape: High arch to add length; angular brow
round.headshot_pose_tip: Three-quarter angle preferred; chin slightly forward and down to elongate

square.identification_rule: Length ≈ width; strong angular jawline; equal forehead and jaw width; sharp angles
hairstyles_men: Tapered fade with volume on top
square.eyebrow_shape: Soft arch to soften jawline; rounded shape; never angular
square.headshot_pose_tip: Slight angle softens jaw; avoid straight-on shots

heart.identification_rule: Wide forehead; narrow chin; defined cheekbones; tapered to point at chin
hairstyles_women: Chin-length bobs adding weight to chin
heart.eyebrow_shape: Soft arch; not too thin; rounded brow
heart.headshot_pose_tip: Forehead slightly tilted down; bring chin forward to add definition

oblong.identification_rule: Length > 1.6x width; straight parallel sides; long forehead and chin
hairstyles_men: Medium length with width at sides
facial_hair_men: Beard with width on cheeks (mutton chops, full beard)
oblong.eyebrow_shape: Straighter brow to widen face; horizontal line
oblong.headshot_pose_tip: Straight-on or slight angle; avoid chin-down which elongates

diamond.identification_rule: Narrow forehead; wide cheekbones; narrow chin; angular face
diamond.eyebrow_shape: Slightly fuller brow; soft curve; not too arched
eyewear_frames: Rimless that don't compete with cheekbones
diamond.headshot_pose_tip: Three-quarter angle softens cheekbone width; slight chin tilt

triangle.identification_rule: Narrow forehead; wide jawline; widest at jaw
hairstyles_women: Layered shorter at top, longer at chin
hairstyles_women_avoid: Heavy chin-length cuts adding jaw weight
triangle.eyebrow_shape: Bold high arches to widen forehead; statement brows
triangle.headshot_pose_tip: Slight angle; emphasize forehead/eyes upper half of frame

vertical_proportions._instructions: Length of torso vs legs affects styling rules. Identified by: while seated, where waistline sits relative to total body length

balanced.rules: Standard styling applies; can wear most rises and lengths

short_waisted_long_legs.characteristics: Short distance from underarm to natural waist; long legs from waist down
rules: Avoid dropping waistlines below natural waist
Tucked-in tops with belt slightly below natural waist
Empire waist adds leg length visually
Same-color shoe and trouser create unbroken leg line
Avoid wide horizontal belts at natural waist (cuts further)
Crop tops only if pairing with high-rise

horizontal_proportions._instructions: Pattern and accessory scale should match body scale

petite_under_5_3.pattern_scale: Small to medium prints only; large prints overwhelm
petite_under_5_3.heel_height_advice: 2.5-4 inches adds proportion without being overwhelming

average_5_3_to_5_8.pattern_scale: Medium prints work best; can wear small or large with care

tall_above_5_8.pattern_scale: Medium to large prints; small prints disappear
tall_above_5_8.accessory_scale: Medium to large; small accessories look proportionally tiny
tall_above_5_8.heel_height_advice: Optional; flats and low heels work beautifully

skin_tone_palette_matrix._instructions: Each cell maps (skin_depth × undertone) to a personalized 18-color palette. Based on Color Me Beautiful 12-season system adapted for South Asian skin tones.

avoid: Muddy browns close to skin tone
7_8_dusky_deep.best_white: Pure white works beautifully; ivory also flattering

7_8_dusky_deep.black_alternative: Black works well; espresso for warmth

style_personalities._instructions: Based on ICBI public framework. Each person has a primary and secondary style personality. Use to layer over body shape recommendations.

classic.best_for: Corporate executives, senior leaders, judiciary, banking

romantic.best_for: Customer-facing roles, hospitality, education with younger students

dramatic.best_for: Senior leadership, public-facing roles, performing arts, leadership

natural_sporty.best_for: Tech roles, creative roles, day-to-day teaching, field work

creative.best_for: Design roles, creative leads, founders, public personalities

style_personalities._for_instructors_default: natural_sporty (everyday teaching) + classic (formal events) — most versatile combination for NxtWave classroom

kurta_silhouette_matrix._instructions: Body shape × kurta silhouette compatibility. Values: 'recommended' | 'acceptable' | 'avoid'

nivi.origin: Andhra Pradesh / Telangana / standard modern drape
nivi.characteristics: Pleated front, pallu over left shoulder, single side drape

bengali.characteristics: Box-pleat-less drape, pallu over both shoulders, longer front pleats

gujarati_seedha_pallu.characteristics: Pallu in front (right shoulder to left side), shows blouse design

lehenga_style.characteristics: Pleats spread out at bottom like a lehenga; wider at hem

belted_modern.characteristics: Standard nivi drape with statement belt at waist

mermaid_fishtail.characteristics: Fitted at hips, flared at knee level

shoulder_seam.rule: Seam ends at shoulder bone end

chest_pinch_test.rule: Maximum 1 inch fabric pinch at chest

shirt_length.rule: Covers waistband by 2 inches when untucked

collar_neck.rule: Two-finger gap between collar and neck

break.rule: Full break (touches shoe with slight fold) or half break (light fold) — half-break is modern standard

shoulder.rule: Seam at shoulder bone end; no overhang

chest.rule: Buttoned with fist between chest and lapel

sleeve_length.rule: Quarter to half inch of shirt cuff visible

jacket_length.rule: Covers seat fully; ends at thumb-knuckle when arms relaxed

back_collar.rule: Collar lies flat against shirt, no gap
back_collar.too_loose: Visible gap between jacket and shirt collar

shoulder_seam.rule: Seam at shoulder bone end (unless intentional drop-shoulder)

bust_dart_placement.too_tight: Pulling across bust; no dart definition

length.rule: Knee/mid-calf/ankle by occasion and body shape

back_depth.rule: Modest plus comfortable; based on personal preference and occasion

waist.rule: Sits at intended height (high/mid/low) with no muffin top

L1_smart_casual.core: Chinos + button-down (no tie); leather sneakers acceptable; layered with cardigan or unstructured blazer
L1_smart_casual.examples: Beige chinos + light blue oxford shirt + brown loafers + tan belt

L2_business_casual.examples: Charcoal trousers + white shirt + navy blazer + brown derby; or chinos + button-down + sport coat
L2_business_casual.avoid: Sneakers, jeans, polo shirts in formal classroom

L3_business_formal.core: Suit + tie + oxford shoes; leather belt matching shoes
L3_business_formal.examples: Navy suit + light blue shirt + burgundy tie + brown oxfords
L3_business_formal.avoid: Loud patterns, casual shoes, no tie

L4_boardroom.core: Dark suit + white shirt + conservative tie + black oxford; pocket square optional
L4_boardroom.examples: Charcoal suit + white shirt + navy tie + black oxford + silver cufflinks
L4_boardroom.avoid: Brown shoes (controversial in conservative L4), bold patterns

L1_smart_casual.core: Kurti + palazzo or smart Western dress; minimal jewelry
L1_smart_casual.examples: Beige kurti + white palazzo + dupatta + nude flats; or printed shirt-dress + flats

L2_business_casual.core: Saree (work-appropriate) or formal kurta set or blazer + trousers
L2_business_casual.examples: Cotton saree + tailored blouse + minimal jewelry; or trousers + shirt + blazer

L3_business_formal.core: Power saree or structured suit or formal dress
L3_business_formal.examples: Tussar silk saree + tailored blouse; or pantsuit; or formal sheath dress

L4_boardroom.core: Formal saree or conservative suit; minimal but quality jewelry
L4_boardroom.examples: Silk saree in solid color + tailored blouse + pearls; or charcoal pantsuit + closed-toe heels

formality_definitions.nxtwave_default: L2 — Business casual is the everyday classroom standard
formality_definitions.nxtwave_special_events: L3 — Industry visits, convocation, parent meetings, formal panels

the_60_30_10_rule.description: 60% dominant color (typically neutral) + 30% secondary color + 10% accent color
the_60_30_10_rule.example_outfit: 60% navy trousers/blazer + 30% white shirt + 10% red tie/pocket square

monochromatic.description: Single color in different shades — most slimming and elongating
monochromatic.example: Charcoal trousers + light gray shirt + dark gray blazer

complementary.description: Opposite colors on color wheel for high contrast

analogous.description: Colors next to each other on wheel for harmonious looks

neutral_plus_pop.description: All neutrals + one statement color accent
neutral_plus_pop.example: Beige kurta + white palazzo + cobalt blue dupatta + cobalt earrings

color_blocking.description: Two contrasting solid colors in clear blocks
color_blocking.example: Solid red top + solid navy bottom

cultural_color_taboos_india.white_only: Reserved for funerals/mourning in many Hindu communities — be cautious for celebratory events
cultural_color_taboos_india.all_black: Some communities consider inauspicious for weddings/religious events
cultural_color_taboos_india.yellow_haldi: Associated with pre-wedding haldi function — context matters
cultural_color_taboos_india.red_bridal: Strong bridal association — avoid pure red saree at someone else's wedding
cultural_color_taboos_india.green_eid: Auspicious for Muslim festivals — culturally appreciated
cultural_color_taboos_india.white_saree_red_border: Bengali traditional — appropriate for cultural events

small_prints.best_for: Petite frames; small accessories; office-appropriate; subtle classroom looks

large_prints.best_for: Tall and broader frames; statement events; festive wear

pattern_scale_rules.scaling_principle: Print size should match the size of the wearer's body frame. Petite + large print = overwhelmed. Tall + tiny print = lost detail.

earrings_women.petite_5_3_under: Studs to small drops; avoid chandelier
earrings_women.tall_5_8_above: Statement drops, longer chandeliers, bold studs

bag_proportions.rule: Body height ÷ 4 = ideal bag depth in inches (rough guide)
bag_proportions.tall: Medium to large bags; small bags look proportionally tiny

heel_heights_women.tall_above_5_8: Flats to 2 inches; tall heels often unnecessary

1A_fine.avoid: Heavy conditioners; heavy oils that flatten

predominantly_grey_50_plus.considerations: Silver/grey hair pairs beautifully with cool-toned wardrobe

clean_shave.maintenance: Daily; quality razor; pre-shave oil + post-shave balm

boxed_beard.maintenance: Weekly trim; daily comb; beard oil; defined cheek line

full_beard.maintenance: Weekly trim; daily oil; combing; mustache trim

sikh_kesh_practice.respect: Hair and beard not to be cut per religious practice

men_eyebrows.maintenance: Trim monthly; remove unibrow stragglers; do not over-pluck
men_eyebrows.salon_or_self: Self-maintenance OK; salon every 2-3 months for shaping

women_eyebrows.maintenance: Shape every 3-4 weeks at salon; daily comb upward

women_makeup_classroom_appropriate.philosophy: Subtle, polished, professional — never distracting from teaching
5_minute_routine: Tinted lip balm or nude lipstick

nails.men: Trimmed weekly; clean under nails; cuticles maintained; clear coat optional
nails.women_classroom: Trimmed; if polished — neutral colors (nude, soft pink, clear); no chipping; no neon for classroom
nails.frequency: Manicure every 2-3 weeks recommended; can be DIY

body_odor_management.climate_specific_hot_humid: Antiperspirant + change of inner-shirt for evening sessions

hijab_styling.color_coordination: Match hijab to outfit's accent color OR neutral that complements skin tone palette

face_shape_drape.round: Pin to one side creating asymmetry; avoid full coverage equally on both sides
face_shape_drape.long_oblong: Looser drape adding width to face
face_shape_drape.heart: Volume at chin level with style

hijab_styling.professional_classroom_recommendation: Solid neutral color hijab with subtle textures; well-pinned; no excessive volume

turban_sikh_styling.color_coordination: Turban color can match shirt OR contrast as accent — avoid clashing with tie
turban_sikh_styling.fabric: Voil cotton (most common); silk for special events
turban_sikh_styling.professional_classroom_recommendation: Solid colors (navy, maroon, black, white, cream) for daily; coordinated with outfit
turban_sikh_styling.salon_help: Can have professional tie weekly for clean look
turban_sikh_styling.beard_coordination: Beard kept tied (gutta) for professional settings

blouse_designs_classroom: 3/4 sleeve high neck or boat neck
saree_only_preference.petticoat_quality_advice: Match color to saree base; quality cotton; proper length
saree_pin_essentials: Safety pins for pleats and pallu

veshti_dhoti_traditional.modern_acceptance: Increasingly accepted in formal settings in South Indian institutions
veshti_dhoti_traditional.color_coordination: White cream as base; angavastram (shawl) provides accent color
veshti_dhoti_traditional.fabric: Pure cotton for daily; silk for special occasions

modest_dress_general.principle: Coverage with style; minimal exposure of arms/legs/cleavage

capsule_wardrobe_templates._instructions: 30-day, 60-day, 90-day wardrobe builds calibrated to budget. Items should mix-and-match to create 15+ outfits.

tops: 3 dress shirts (white, light blue, light pink)

tops_kurtas: 2 cotton kurtas (one beige/cream, one solid color)

sarees: 2 cotton sarees with tailored blouses (if saree-wearing)

instructor_classroom_stance.feet: Shoulder-width apart for stability and authority
instructor_classroom_stance.weight_distribution: Even on both feet; avoid hip-cocking (looks casual)
instructor_classroom_stance.spine: Tall, neutral curve, ribs not flared
instructor_classroom_stance.shoulders: Down and back; relaxed not raised
instructor_classroom_stance.head: Level; chin parallel to ground
instructor_classroom_stance.hands: Relaxed at sides; gesture purposefully when speaking; avoid fidgeting

forward_head.fix: Daily 5-min chin tucks (10 reps); awareness exercise; ergonomic setup

rounded_shoulders.cause: Same as above; lack of upper back strength
rounded_shoulders.fix: Daily wall angels (10 reps); doorway stretches; rear-delt exercises

hip_tilt_anterior.fix: Hip flexor stretches; glute strengthening; planks

swayback.fix: Posterior pelvic tilt awareness; core strengthening

five_minute_daily_routine: Doorway chest stretch - 30 seconds each side
Standing tall with deep breathing - 1 minute

sitting_posture_office.screen_height: Top of screen at eye level

speaking_body_language.eye_contact: 3-5 second engagement with each section of room; rotate naturally
speaking_body_language.gestures: Open palms; use hands to emphasize points; avoid pointing fingers
speaking_body_language.facial_expression: Match content; smile at appropriate moments; nod when students respond
speaking_body_language.movement: Move with purpose; avoid pacing; plant feet when making key points
speaking_body_language.vocal: Vary pitch and pace; pause for emphasis; avoid filler words

outfit_choice.men: L2-L3 — solid color shirt (light blue, white, soft pink), blazer optional, simple collar; avoid busy patterns near face
outfit_choice.women: L2-L3 — solid color top in personal palette, clean neckline (V-neck, scoop, modest), avoid busy patterns/heavy embellishment near face

headshot_photo_guidance.color_strategy: Wear colors from your personal palette near face; avoid white-on-white (washes out) or all-black (loses dimension)

pose_by_face_shape.oval: Slight chin tilt down; natural three-quarter angle
pose_by_face_shape.round: Three-quarter angle; chin slightly forward and down
pose_by_face_shape.square: Slight angle softens jaw; avoid straight-on
pose_by_face_shape.heart: Forehead slightly tilted down; chin forward
pose_by_face_shape.oblong: Straight-on or slight angle; avoid chin-down

headshot_photo_guidance.expression: Genuine soft smile (eyes engaged); avoid teeth showing in too-wide smile for corporate; gentle approachable
headshot_photo_guidance.background: Plain neutral (gray, off-white, soft blue); avoid patterns or distracting elements
headshot_photo_guidance.lighting: Soft natural light from front; avoid harsh overhead; window light (not direct sun) is ideal

pregnancy.behavior: Skip body shape analysis. Show pregnancy-friendly recommendations: empire waist, A-line, soft drapes, comfortable fabrics. Focus modules: face, hair, skin tone, color palette, accessories.

trimester_specific.first_trimester: Standard maternity not needed; focus on comfort with stretchy waistbands
trimester_specific.second_trimester: Empire waist, A-line, maxi dresses; maternity wear introduction
trimester_specific.third_trimester: Full maternity wear; comfort priority; simple elegant pieces

post_partum.behavior: Forgiving silhouettes; empire waist; wraps; avoid recommendations to return to pre-pregnancy size; honor the body's recovery
post_partum.language_overrides: Strong avoidance of weight loss/return-to-shape language

recent_weight_change.trigger: user reports weight change > 5kg in 3 months
recent_weight_change.behavior: Run analysis but flag in result. Recommend re-assessment in 2 months. Suggest alteration-bias over replacement.
recent_weight_change.language_overrides: No mention of weight loss/gain in recommendations.

hijab_wearer.behavior: Face shape uses visible facial features only. Replace hairstyle module with hijab styling module. Necklines guidance applies to outer layer only (modest necklines underneath).

sikh_turban_beard.behavior: Face shape uses available features. Add turban color/fabric coordination. Beard recommendations respect Kesh practice (no shaving/trimming recommendation).

saree_only_preference.behavior: All Western wear modules suppressed. Deep saree expertise activated.

veshti_dhoti_only.behavior: Western trouser modules suppressed. Detailed dhoti/veshti styling activated.

wheelchair_user.behavior: Body shape adjusted for seated posture. Recommendations weighted to upper body. Trouser length and break rules updated for seated wear. Skirt length adjusted.

limb_difference.behavior: Sensitivity in language. Sleeve and trouser modifications offered. Tailoring recommendations strong.
limb_difference.language_priority: Empowering language; focus on what works

skin_conditions_visible.trigger: user reports visible skin conditions (vitiligo, severe acne, eczema, scars)
skin_conditions_visible.behavior: Avoid prescriptive skincare medical advice. Refer to dermatologist. Focus on outfit and color choices that build confidence. Color theory becomes especially important.

budget_under_2k.behavior: Capsule wardrobe of 7 items maximum. Second-hand and local tailor sourcing tips. Alteration-over-replacement bias. Free posture and grooming routines emphasized over purchases.

tier_2_city_availability.behavior: Bias recommendations to widely-available brands. Online shopping links (Myntra, Ajio, Flipkart) provided. Avoid niche international references.

hot_humid_climate.behavior: Cotton/linen bias. Light colors permitted at L2. Sweat-management tips. Inner-cotton-vest for shirts. Antiperspirant emphasis.

cool_climate.behavior: Layering module activated. Cardigan/blazer essential. Wool blends introduced.

low_confidence_body_shape.behavior: Show two closest shapes. Ask user clarification questions about shopping experience.
questions: When you shop, do tops fit easily but bottoms feel tight, or vice versa?
Where do you usually need alterations on store-bought clothing?
Do you have a defined waist when you stand straight?

nonbinary_user.trigger: user.gender === 'NB' or user requests gender-neutral framing
nonbinary_user.behavior: Allow user to pick from M and F rulesets, or both. Use ungendered language in playbook. Style personality module especially important here.

transgender_user.behavior: Sensitivity prompt at onboarding. Allow user to choose ruleset that matches their expression. Private mode default. Honor their stated gender for all recommendations.

very_short_under_5_feet.behavior: Petite styling priority. Pattern scale to small. Heel height 2.5-4 inches recommended. Monochromatic dressing. Avoid oversized accessories.

very_tall_above_6_feet.behavior: Tall styling priority. Pattern scale medium-large. Long lengths preferred. Maxi dresses, long jackets, full-length trousers.

language_safety_rules._instructions: These phrases must NEVER appear in any output. AI orchestrator validates against this list before returning to user.

brand_recommendations_india.trusted_local_tailors_advice: Most reliable for fit; build relationship with one tailor; alterations cost ₹100-500 per piece typically; full custom tailoring ₹600-3000 per piece

instructor_specific_contexts._meta: NxtWave-specific styling considerations for the NIAT instructor role

online_class_dressing.principle: Top half matters most; bottom half can be casual
online_class_dressing.color_strategy: Solid colors near face; avoid busy patterns, greens (chroma key issues), pure white (overexposes), pure black (loses detail)
online_class_dressing.background_coordination: Outfit color should complement classroom/home background; not blend in
online_class_dressing.lighting_consideration: Wear colors that work in artificial light, not just daylight

industry_visit_dressing.principle: Match or slightly exceed the host industry's formality
industry_visit_dressing.tech_companies: L2 — business casual; trousers, button-down, optional blazer
industry_visit_dressing.manufacturing: L2 — business casual; closed-toe shoes essential

parent_meeting_dressing.men: L2 — trousers, button-down, optional blazer; conservative colors
parent_meeting_dressing.women: L2 — modest cotton/silk saree OR full kurta-palazzo set OR conservative Western formal
parent_meeting_dressing.avoid: Bright bold colors, heavy makeup, casual fits

convocation_dressing.principle: Celebratory but dignified; representing the institution
convocation_dressing.men: L3-L4 — suit and tie; bandhgala for traditional events
convocation_dressing.women: L3 — silk saree (Kanjeevaram, Banarasi for special) OR formal Indo-Western
convocation_dressing.ceremonial_robes: Worn over formal wear if required
